docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-17-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUNTER WITTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TAYLOR KARST IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-17-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT BREAKS DOWN. IF NO APPEARANCE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY WITTY, HUNTER AS TO DEFENDANT KARST, TAYLOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 SERVED OCT-27-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARST, TAYLOR
